name: Soyburgers
recipeIngredient: 1 1/3 cup Sunflower seeds (or a combination of seeds and peanuts)
Wheat germ, dry bread crumbs (or cracker crumbs)
recipeInstructions:
Nikki and David Goldbeck have a wide selection of vegetarian burgers (and a burger mix) in their book "American Wholefoods Cuisine" (New American Library, 1983). Included are cashew burgers, rice cheeseburgers, bean burgers and more.
In a food processor, grind the seeds (or seeds and nuts) to a fine meal. Add the beans and grind to a dry pulp. Add onion and soy sauce and mix just to blend. If the mixture is very soft, add wheat germ or crumbs to dry it out so you can form it into patties.
Form them into burger shapes using about 1/2 cup mixture for each. To cook, bake on a preheated pan at 350°F for 20 minutes, or broil about 3 inches from heat for 5-8 minutes per side. Serve on toast or buns with ketchup or barbecue sauce.
